race.comment: DIACON (5) has found the line well to pick up a couple of minor placings since returning from a spell, most recently over this trip at Wyong. The lightly raced filly looks to be improving with racing and gets a good opportunity to break through at her third run back. TESSY TEE (14) was disappointing last start but has been freshened and a tongue tie goes on, so she's worth another chance. Fresh runners YOU SEXY THING (3) and WOOTTEN IT BE NICE (8) both return from spells after showing ability in limited outings and have trialled in preparation. The former is already a winner and looks capable of making her presence felt, while the latter is expected to return positively.
